vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp thanh lịch tinh tế (không phô trương)
vocab.example: I gravitate towards leather loafers because they exude a sense of understated elegance that works for both work and social events.

vocab.meaning: độ bám tối ưu (chống trơn trượt)
vocab.example: When I go trekking, I rely on boots with specialized rubber outsoles that provide optimal grip on uneven surfaces.

vocab.meaning: chọn giải pháp an toàn hơn là... (ở đây là chọn sự thoải mái)
vocab.example: Although high heels look stunning, I usually err on the side of comfort and choose flat ballet pumps for daily wear.

vocab.meaning: thiết kế công thái học (vừa vặn, bảo vệ sức khỏe)
vocab.example: Many modern trainers feature an ergonomic design that supports the natural arch of the foot, preventing long-term strain.

vocab.meaning: làm tôn lên/phối hợp hoàn hảo với bộ trang phục
vocab.example: A sleek pair of Chelsea boots can perfectly complement an outfit, making even a simple jeans-and-tee look more polished.
While designer stilettos are aesthetically pleasing, they are often exorbitantly priced and quite impractical for my lifestyle.

vocab.meaning: khả năng hút ẩm/thoát mồ hôi
vocab.example: I prefer athletic shoes with moisture-wicking properties to ensure my feet stay dry during intense workout sessions.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp kinh điển không lỗi mốt
vocab.example: Canvas high-tops are a timeless classic that have remained popular across generations due to their simple yet iconic look.

vocab.meaning: cung cấp sự ổn định hai bên (giảm lật cổ chân)
vocab.example: For playing tennis, I need specialized footwear that can provide lateral stability during quick, side-to-side movements.

vocab.meaning: tay nghề thủ công cao cấp
vocab.example: I appreciate hand-stitched brogues because the premium craftsmanship ensures the shoes last for decades rather than just seasons.
